user.title: Vietnam Weather (NCHMF)
user.description: Choose a province from the list, or paste an NCHMF page URL (from nchmf.gov.vn). The default is Da Nang.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure NCHMF location
reconfigure.description: Change the province/URL or the display name.

error.cannot_connect: Could not fetch or parse the page. Check the URL.

no_data.title: NCHMF: no data parsed for {name}
no_data.description: The integration fetched {url} but could not parse temperature or forecast. The NCHMF page layout may have changed. Check for an integration update, or report the issue.
